steps.title: Inspect Expensive Flow Summary
steps.prompt: Inspect the latest expensive-flow summary and identify whether dominant_flow_kind and operator_next_priority still explain the current operator bottleneck. Focus on wrong_next_step, reroute_loop, output_bloat, and over_stage_entry ordering.

checks.cmd: python3 -c 'import json, subprocess; out = subprocess.check_output(["python3", "scripts/omc_skill_benchmark.py", "top-expensive-flows", "--input", "scripts/fixtures/omc_response_mode_cases.json", "--top-n", "5"], text=True); data = json.loads(out); assert data["summary"]["dominant_flow_kind"] == "wrong_next_step"; assert data["summary"]["operator_next_priority"] == "tighten_next_action_routing"'
checks.label: expensive flow summary

steps.title: Verify Operator Priority Explanation
steps.prompt: Validate whether operator_next_priority, output_bloat_followup_needed, and operator_validation_status remain consistent with the observed flow mix. If wrong_next_step is not dominant, confirm that output_bloat follow-up does not preempt it.

checks.cmd: python3 -c 'import json, subprocess; report_out = subprocess.check_output(["python3", "scripts/omc_autopilot.py", "benchmark-report"], text=True); report = json.loads(report_out); assert report["status"] == "completed"; assert report["pipeline_success"] is True; assert report["operational_validation_stage"] == "operator_experience_validation"; summary_out = subprocess.check_output(["python3", "scripts/omc_skill_benchmark.py", "top-expensive-flows", "--input", "scripts/fixtures/omc_response_mode_cases.json", "--top-n", "5"], text=True); data = json.loads(summary_out); summary = data["summary"]; assert summary["operator_validation_status"] == "ready_to_close"; assert summary["output_bloat_followup_needed"] is False; assert summary["output_bloat_status_line"] == "output_bloat observed but not dominant; keep focus on wrong_next_step"'
checks.label: operator experience report
